name: driftlock
description: Adaptive SDD harness for long-horizon coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Lock product intent before agents write code.
interface.longDescription: Driftlock is an adaptive spec-driven development harness for long-horizon coding agents. It locks user intent into testable specs, executes from gated task splits, and escalates to Debug, CE, or model advisors only when failure signals require it.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Driftlock to lock my product intent into a spec and execute it through gated long-horizon agent workflow.
